head.title: Real estate litigation | Moonstone Advocates
head.description: Resolve property disputes with confidence. Our Real Estate Litigation team provides clear, practical advice and tailored strategies to protect your interests.
head.ogDescription: Resolve property disputes with confidence. Our Real Estate Litigation team provides clear, practical advice and tailored strategies to protect your interests.

blocks.html:
Real Estate Litigation

Property disputes often bring pressure and uncertainty. We work closely with you to understand your priorities from the outset. That means we can shape a strategy that’s practical, focused and built around the outcome you want. When needed, we work alongside our Real Estate colleagues to give you joined up advice across every stage of your matter. The result is clear, consistent support that helps you move forward with confidence.

For businesses
Real Estate Litigation

Services

Our real estate litigation services give you clear, practical support from the outset, backed by a team that understands both the legal detail and the commercial reality.

Speak to an expert

Asset Management

Take control of your commercial property with clear, decisive support that protects your income, manages risk, and keeps your portfolio moving forward.

Development

If you’re driving a development project, we’ll help you clear obstacles quickly, protect your position, and keep your scheme moving on time and on budget.

Dilapidations

Facing a dilapidations claim demands clear, strategic advice that protects your position and secures a commercial outcome that works for you.

Real Property Issues

When a dispute over land or property arises, we act quickly to protect your position and steer you towards a practical, cost effective resolution.

Telecoms

Legal advice for landowners and occupiers dealing with telecom operators, telecom leases, and the Electronic Communications Code.

Experts in every area
